name: Snackio
author: Poki
description: Snackio is a mouse-controlled snake game! Guide your slithery friend through tricky obstacles, grab juicy apples, and aim to collect all three stars in each level. Munch on delicious snacks along the way, unlock cool new skins, and master every challenge. Can you become the ultimate snack champion? How to play Snackio? Navigate your snake with your cursor or the joystick. Who created Snackio? Snackio is created by PlayCap. Play their other games on Poki: Growmi , Phox Forage , and Snake Solver ! How can I play Snackio for free? You can play Snackio for free on Poki. Can I play Snackio on mobile devices and desktop? Snackio can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
